prompt: Summarize why local model benchmarking matters in one short paragraph.

Write a structured explanation of how you would compare two local inference providers on latency, throughput, instruction following, memory use, and deployment ergonomics. Keep the explanation practical and oriented toward engineering tradeoffs.

Produce a detailed benchmarking plan for local generative AI systems that covers prompt selection, repeatability, warmup runs, sampling controls, concurrency limits, provider-specific model loading, system metrics, output quality checks, multimodal extensibility, and report generation. Include implementation caveats, expected failure modes, and operator guidance for rerunning tests on new models.
